THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSS, JOHN LEE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 516 O'FARRELL ST, #227 $1,869.88 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,869.88, STAYED UNTIL DEC-07-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT NO EVICTION UNTIL AFTER 9AM, 12/7/94; EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS; NO FURTHER STAYS; (SEE FILE FOR MORE DETAIL).
